sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: 42.2g of fat. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. for seeds, the fat profile is one of the biggest reasons they earn their place.

sections.narration: magnesium at 94% daily value, zinc at 30% daily value, iron at 32% daily value stand out most. that gives this food real mineral support.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: now the downsides: paper scores can overstate realistic serving sizes. people often eat far less than 100 grams. texture or prep can be a barrier. not everyone uses seeds consistently. real serving sizes are often small. some strong paper numbers are hard to cash out in practice.

closing.summary: Ground Flaxseed has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best as a support food that boosts meals instead of carrying them alone.
closing.useCaseNote: Best as a support food that boosts meals instead of carrying them alone.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?

explanation.summary: Fats are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in A tier.
